svg.title: Longhorn, Kopiur, and Barman failure domains
svg.desc: Longhorn and CSI snapshots remain inside Kubernetes. Kopiur copies application data to RustFS and restores replacement PVCs before binding. CloudNativePG uses a separate Barman bucket.
